READ ME:

For reference on the API documents

AUB PayMate Merchant Presented-QR Code Payment API Specification_V1.4.3		-	WechatPay, UnionPay, Alipay+ QR

AUB PayMate A+ Web API documentation	-	Alipay+ Web

AUB ShopeePay	-	ShopeePay

AUB Merchant-Presented-QR_V1.4.3	-	QRPH, Instapay, GCash Web, GrabPay Web, WechatPay, UnionPay, GCash, GrabPay

How to integrate Card API_031924	-	Card Payment guide

AUB Card Cashier API	-	Card Payment API


card-demo	-	Card Payment demo code
